ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Minda Parrish and David Hoffman appearing for Laurie Unsworth. David Kelvin appearing for and with administator, George Costello. Linda Morris-Lauck, petitioner and Douglas Unsworth are both in court. Stipulation reached on clear title for Laurie Unsworth. Request to approve stipulation is granted. Order signed. Linda Morris-Lauck made a statement regarding her petition to determine interest. Mr. Hoffman argued that proper notice was not given. Court wants proper notice to be given to all parties that are entitled to notice. Matter is continued to 4/26. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
